release_notes:
Version 2.7.8 - Critical Interaction & Multi-Account Fixes
✨ New Features & Fixes:
- Core: Fixed 'Unhashable Element' error causing crashes in Facebook Feed.
- Facebook Reels: Fixed 'Illegal return statement' and improved 'Like/Comment' button detection.
- Multi-Account: Fixed 'Start Bot' logic to correctly handle all accounts even with open browsers.
- Instagram: Fixed missing variable and improved launcher stability.
